turns.name: WILLIAM H. REHNQUIST
turns.text: The opinion of the Court in No. 85-1244, City of Pleasant Grove versus United States will be announced by Justice White.

turns.name: BYRON R. WHITE
turns.text: This is a reapportionment case and it is here on appeal from the United States District Court for the District of Columbia. And for the reasons stated in an opinion on file with the Clerk, the judgment of the District Court is affirmed. Justice Powell has filed a dissenting opinion in which the Chief Justice and Justice O'Connor have joined.
